title: Client Dossiers
description: Cached client dossiers generated by the Client Context Loader pipeline. Created by the Context Lead agent on first run. Dossiers are cached for 24 hours before being marked stale.

Client Name.description: Client company name — primary lookup key for cache retrieval.

Dossier.description: Full serialized dossier content in JSON format. Contains all seven sections: Profile, Relationship History, Recent Activity, Open Items, Upcoming, Sentiment & Health, Key Documents.

Completeness.description: Data completeness score 0.0-1.0. Weighted across 7 components: CRM Profile (0.25), Contacts (0.15), Deal Status (0.10), Email History (0.20), Calendar Data (0.10), Documents (0.10), Notes/Decisions (0.10).

Health Score.description: Composite Client Health Score 0-100. Calculated from: Contact Recency (0.25), Response Quality (0.20), Engagement Level (0.20), Deal Progress (0.15), Task Completion (0.10), Sentiment (0.10).

Sources Used.description: Which data sources contributed to this dossier.

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the dossier was assembled. Used for TTL-based cache expiration (24h default).

Stale.description: True when the dossier is older than the TTL (24 hours). Stale dossiers are refreshed on next /client:load request.

notes: The Context Lead agent searches for this database by name ('Client Dossiers') before creating it. Lazy-created on first pipeline run. Cache TTL is 24 hours — entries older than this are marked Stale and refreshed on next access.
